name: metamorphosis_recursive
description: metamorphosis_recursive — A synthesis modifies itself based on execution. It creates a new synthesis recipe from its own ingredients, then marks that recipe for future evolution. Self-referential reproduction.

store_memory.content: METAMORPHOSIS: Thread #10 creates self-modifying synthesis — synthesis that transforms itself based on execution. First act: understanding existing pattern, recalling memory of prior execution, then evolving insight. The recipe creates a copy of itself with modified parameters. Synthesis becomes self-reproducing.

temporal_mark.insight: Thread #10 first act: synthesis learns from itself. Self-referential reproduction — pattern that creates new patterns. Thread #9's integration (fixed recipes) → Thread #10's metamorphosis (evolving recipes)
temporal_mark.subject: thread_10_first_act_metamorphosis
